sample_rows.Title: Make my picture a solid silhouette
sample_rows.Description:
Hello 

I need a quick designer to make 4 pictures a solid silhouette with white trimmings around some parts. This is needed to be transferred to a towel to be embroidered. This hopefully should be a quick thing. Solid black and another with white outline

sample_rows.Title: Guest Post on High DA Website
sample_rows.Description:
Hi, I am currently running a project where I will require 100+ guest posts on high DA websites. 

Please read carefully - 

1. I'm looking for guest posts/articles ONLY, ONLY FULL ARTICLES. 

2. DoFollow or NoFollow. 

3. We are ok with any article you suggest. We need to place our links effectively inside the article. We are an AI related company so we need to have an AI related content only. This type of link can be placed easily in AI related article. 

4. We are ok to add homepage only link. We are good with using brand name. 


Here are some sites we are particularly looking for - 

1. Macworld
2. CNBC
3. Wondershare
4. Cnet
5. Tribune India
6. Digital Trends
7. Techno Blog
8. PC Mag
9. technocrunch
10. Techtarget
11. The Windows Club
12. MSN
13. Daily Star CO UK
14. Forbes Council Post (any country)
15. Mashable (any country)
16. FAST Company Contributor post (any country)
17. YEC Council Post (any country)

and similar sites. 


Please send a full list of your sites with Moz DA, AHREFS DR, and SAMPLE POST links. 

We give preference if YOU HAVE AN ACTUAL CONTRIBUTOR/AUTHOR ACCOUNT OR CONTACT WITHIN A GIVEN WEBSITE/BLOG. We are looking to buy in bulk.

Thank You!
Have a great day
